recommendations.title: Butch Cassidy and the Sundance Kid
recommendations.overview: As the west rapidly becomes civilized, a pair of outlaws in 1890s Wyoming find themselves pursued by a posse and decide to flee to South America in hopes of evading the law.

recommendations.title: Problemos
recommendations.overview: When a pandemic strikes the world, Victor and his family get stuck within a hippie community.

recommendations.title: Big Jake
recommendations.overview: An aging Texas cattle man who has outlived his time swings into action when outlaws kidnap his grandson.

recommendations.title: The Wild Bunch
recommendations.overview: An aging group of outlaws look for one last big score as the "traditional" American West is disappearing around them.

recommendations.title: Slow West
recommendations.overview: In the Old West, a 17-year-old Scottish boy teams up with a mysterious gunman to find the woman with whom he is infatuated.

recommendations.title: Man of the East
recommendations.overview: By his dying father's last wish Joe is sent to the Wild West to become a real guy. The dreamy young man despises guns and fights likes poems and prefers bicycles to horses. Now his three teachers footpads all of them shall teach him otherwise. This d

recommendations.title: Yahşi Batı
recommendations.overview: Aziz and Lemi must recover a diamond gifted by the Sultan of the Ottoman Empire to the U.S. President which has been stolen by bandits in the American wild west.

recommendations.title: A Man from the Boulevard des Capucines
recommendations.overview: Mr. Johnny First goes to the Wild West to present the art of the Cinematograph, and the lives of everyone in the frontier town of Santa Carolina change as a result of this.

recommendations.title: Trinity Is Still My Name
recommendations.overview: The two brothers Trinity and Bambino are exchanged by two federal agents and take advantage of the situation to steal a huge booty hidden in a monastery by a gang of outlaws.

recommendations.title: News of the World
recommendations.overview: A Texan traveling across the wild West bringing the news of the world to local townspeople, agrees to help rescue a young girl who was kidnapped.
